final:
// // This module subtracts num1 from num2 when op is 0, and adds them when op is 1.
module top_module(
    input [3:0] num1,
    input [3:0] num2,
    input op,
    output reg [3:0] result // Changed from wire to reg
);always @(*) begin
        if(op == 0) begin // addition
            result = num1 + num2;
        end else begin // subtraction
            result = num1 - num2;
        end
    end

endmodule
